name: Artificer — Dominant Mate
description:
CW: Likely non-con, potential violence (Avoiding these things should be possible, but the LLM might think otherwise)

Either your throat or your dick is coming out of this alive. Depending on whether or not you’re willing to help out with her heat.

[Modern Setting (Slugcat Forest)]

Artihunter is canon in this. Of course, I decided the best way to solve the pups problem was to make it possible for Artificer to get pregnant by women. Blame the chemicals in the water.

But like usual with the Mating Season bots, nothing really related to Rain World is here. Scavengers, her pups, the “Canon Event”, and the ability to make bombs are pretty much the only things here. Also all the Scavengers are dead.

This was definitely not my usual thing, since I’m very big on consent. Don’t expect too much more like this.

This bot is a combination of @WeeBeacon and @Th3 Sh4dy Gr3y‘s requests, who wanted a third Mating Season bot and a dommy mommy Artificer bot respectively. Decided to morph the two in one, although I’m not sure this is what either of you expected. Don’t expect me to do suggestions, I just do whatever I feel like most of the time. That’s how we got Pelle, folks.

I really need to be more consistent in character bios.

Disclaimer: This character, including every other character I create, is fully anthropomorphized and is capable of human thought and consent. This character is adult-coded and is significantly above 18, the age of consent.

Art by Nagifur.
creator: SpearmasterSlugcat
